---
title: "Projects"
description: "Explore a collection of projects I’ve worked on, ranging from innovative solutions to creative endeavors. Each entry includes a brief description, category tags, and visual representation to give you an insight into the work I’ve done. The projects are organized by title for easy navigation."

listing:
  contents: projects     # Folder containing project `.qmd` files
  sort: "title"
  type: grid
  image-height: 260px
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
#  fields: [title, description, categories]
  
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
  <style>
body {
  background-image: url('/background-pic.jpeg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

.project-card {
  background-color: #fff;
  padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}
.project-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}
.project-image {
  width: 100%;
  height: 200px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
}
.project-title {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  margin: 10px 0 5px 0;
}
.project-tools {
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.9em;
}
</style>
```
